name: Moroccan Chicken (Calif Fig)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound each chicken breast between two sheets of waxed paper using a flat side of a mallet until about 1/4 inch thick.
2. In a small bowl, combine chopped figs, almonds, honey, and allspice; mix well.
3. Place a spoonful of fig mixture in the center of each flattened fillet.
4. Roll up each chicken breast and secure with toothpicks.
5. Dip each roll in a mixture of flour and sesame seeds.
6. In an 8 or 9-inch skillet, brown each roll in butter until golden brown.
7. Remove the browned rolls from the skillet.
8. Add tomato sauce, onion powder, wine, honey, allspice, salt, and garlic powder to the skillet.
9. Bring to a boil, then add the chicken breasts; cover and simmer for about 30 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with additional chopped almonds and sesame seeds before serving.
11. Serve over hot, fluffy rice.
Makes 4 - 5 servings.
